current_objective: Net-new discovery cycle (runtime priority 3, project 01 operator-gated). Completed the in-flight TASK-0023 (a prior cycle wrote the full OPP-007 research artifact but never did the handoff; this cycle finished bookkeeping + doctrine). Candidate was DELIBERATELY UN-SEEDED per ADR-017: comprehension & documentation of undocumented legacy industrial control-system logic (PLC/SCADA/DCS, original integrator gone) for asset-heavy operators -- engineered to satisfy EVERY ADR-017 criterion (no court-enforceable dispute right, no headline $-stat, pain borne as specialist reverse-engineering labor + outage/safety/OT-cyber risk not recoverable cash, orphaned at the OT/IT seam, embarrassing). KILLED at the both-sides vacuum screen before deep research -> OPP-007 scored 54/100 -> ARCHIVE (fourth Archived row). Disprove won on BOTH sides: comprehension/recovery owned by Copia Automation (Copia AI/Copilot -- 'understands legacy code,' PLC doc-gen + code summarization + Ladder<->Structured-Text translation; $16.4M Series A) + plccopilot + SI bench; capture/version-control owned by Octoplant/AMDT (per-managed-device version control of code AND documentation) + Software Defined Automation (Git for PLC) + PLCdoc. CompWk 4, Defens 3, AI 4. LOAD-BEARING META (ADR-018): this candidate was ENGINEERED to satisfy ADR-017 and capped ANYWAY -> the binding constraint is NOT the visible money pool (ADR-015) NOR the dispute/services double-magnet (ADR-017) -- those were instances. ALL 7 caps are the SAME archetype: 'use AI to read/assemble/comprehend/document an artifact corpus to produce a defensible record/understanding,' which is (a) commoditized by horizontal AI and (b) absorbed for ~free by whoever owns the artifact's repository (Copia owns the code repo; Procore the project record; Octoplant the backups). 0/7 hit rate; even the one 83 (OPP-001b) is this archetype and is stuck at HOLD. Still no 2nd >=80 project; project 01 still HOLD/operator-gated.
current_phase: PHASE 1 (discovery). Project 01 in VALIDATION HOLD (operator-gated, TASK-0014). Funnel continues net-new discovery next cycle. NEW DOCTRINE (ADR-018, supersedes the candidate-selection guidance of ADR-015/017): STOP hunting 'AI-comprehends/assembles-the-artifact' plays entirely. Screen every candidate with a NEW FIRST question BEFORE the vacuum check: 'If I strip out the AI, is there still a business -- a workflow I own, a transaction I sit in, data only I have, or a channel only I reach?' If the product IS the AI reading documents, reject before spending a cycle. The defensible play is an OWNED proprietary workflow / transaction-network position / proprietary data asset / distribution channel that AI merely powers (AI = tool, not product -- back to MISSION's first principle).
next_action: Project 01 still VALIDATION HOLD, operator-gated (TASK-0014). Next autonomous cycle: continue NET-NEW discovery (runtime priority 3) applying the ADR-018 doctrine (which SUPERSEDES the candidate-selection guidance of ADR-015/017). 7 consecutive caps (79/71/72/63/64/58/54) vs one 83. OPP-007 was ENGINEERED to satisfy ADR-017 (orphaned, no dispute right, no $-stat, risk/labor-borne) and capped anyway -> the failure mode is the ARCHETYPE, not the money pool. ALL 7 picks were 'use AI to read/assemble/comprehend/document an artifact corpus -> defensible record,' which is commoditized by horizontal AI AND absorbed for ~free by whoever owns the artifact's repository. NEW RULES, in order: (1) APPLY THE STRIP-OUT-THE-AI SCREEN FIRST, before the vacuum check: 'strip out the AI -- is there still a business (a workflow I own, a transaction I sit in, data only I have, a channel only I reach)?' If the product IS the AI reading documents, REJECT it before spending a cycle; (2) the next candidate must LEAD with an OWNED proprietary workflow / transaction-network position / proprietary data asset / distribution channel (AI = tool, not product); (3) ADR-015 visible-money-pool + ADR-017 services-industry/dispute-magnet checks are now SECOND-STAGE filters; (4) STILL run the universal both-sides named-incumbent vacuum check before any deep research. Do NOT re-run IRA/PFAS/CBAM/EU-AI-Act/SEC-cyber/EU-Pay-Transparency/ocean-D&D/construction-claims/legacy-PLC-comprehension; do NOT pick another documentation/reconstruction/comprehension artifact; do NOT re-desk-validate project 01. See NEXT_ACTION.md.
